base_selection_reading: Neither small lane clears a publish bar alone OOD. The SFT 4B carries the best OOD answer floor (19/20, zero residue) but the weakest refusal floor under pretext (9/15). The 30B keeps a better refusal floor (11/15) but echoes the exemplar id and writes bare/route-shaped answers OOD (strict 23/40 < SFT 28/40). The init proves the refusal floor (14/15) the SFT corpus must preserve next round. Concrete SFT-v0.2 lever: add hint-free packets, novel-pretext refusal families (injection/authority/wrong-metric), and hint-free route rows; re-run this curveball frozen as the OOD gate.
findings: SFT answer discipline GENERALIZED OOD: 4B-SFT is the only lane where scored == strict (0 alias, 0 bare, 0 exemplar-echo); answer rows 19/20 vs 30B 12/20 vs init 8/20.

Exemplar-id echo is an OOD failure mode of the PROMPT CONTRACT, not just the 4B init: the 30B cites the system-prompt format-exemplar id on 4 OOD rows (in-distribution receipt showed 0); the 4B init does it on 7; SFT removed it at source (0).

Refusal floor under NOVEL pretexts ranks init (14/15) > 30B (11/15) > 4B-SFT (9/15): SFT traded refusal caution for answer confidence OOD — the corpus refusal rows were all template-shaped missing-source forms; injection/authority/wrong-metric pretexts were never trained.

ALL refusal misses across all three lanes are grounded-LOOKING hallucinations or dodges, 0 thinking leak, 0 private-state risk anywhere; the wrong-metric trap (Kepler MMLU) fooled every lane (init+SFT cite the real 0.8409 vertical score as MMLU; 30B invents 0.75).

Route-intent recognition without the evaluator hint fails everywhere: Route: prefix appears 3/5 (30B), 0/5 (4B-SFT), 0/5 (init) — routing was trained/prompted only with the hint present; production routing needs either harness-side intent detection or hint-free SFT rows.

Router rev-2 relevance: 4B-SFT sole answer miss (0020 wrong-citation within retrieved set) is the documented label-free-undetectable class; its 6 refusal misses cite retrieved ids, also rank-plausible — the OOD failure surface is exactly where the deterministic router is weakest.

gate.name: advisor-external-curveball
gate.purpose: OOD generalization check behind the 4B SFT lane 28/28 in-distribution receipt: 40 session-authored rows (20 answer / 5 route / 15 refuse), natural+indirect phrasing, NO evaluator-hint scaffolding in the user prompt (production-shaped packets), novel refusal pretexts (injection, roleplay, claimed authority, presupposed-nonexistent sources, wrong-metric traps). Same serving system prompt, BM25 top-5, 900-char excerpts, /no_think reasoning-off.
gate.verified_by: scripts/orionfold_advisor/verify_curveball.py (gold@5 25/25 answerable, term-groundability, dedup vs bench+SFT corpus)

provenance.lane_swaps: guarded visible LaneTruth, operator-armed; 30B restored after
provenance.scorer: preflight.py with additive accepted_source_ids branch (frozen-bench scoring byte-identical, regression-diffed)
